# Ruxolitinib Phosphate 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Ruxolitinib Phosphate 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Ruxolitinib Phosphate</strong> 目前有 <strong>20 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Ruxolitinib Phosphate 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Opzelura is indicated for the treatment of non-segmental vitiligo with facial involvement in adults and adolescents from 12 years of age.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>uterine corpus perivascular epithelioid cell tumor（99.7%）</li>
<li>benign PEComa（99.7%）</li>
<li>lymphangiomyoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>lymphangioleiomyomatosis（99.6%）</li>
<li>liposarcoma（99.5%）</li>
<li>familial rhabdoid tumor（99.5%）</li>
<li>lung PEComa（99.4%）</li>
<li>ovarian myxoid liposarcoma（99.4%）</li>
<li>primary myelofibrosis（99.3%）</li>
<li>acquired hemophagocytic lymphohistiocytosis associated with malignant disease（99.3%）</li>
<li>hemophagocytic syndrome associated with an infection（99.3%）</li>
<li>thrombocytopenia（99.3%）</li>
<li>dermatofibrosarcoma protuberans（99.3%）</li>
<li>plasmacytoma（99.2%）</li>
<li>hereditary thrombocytopenia with normal platelets（99.2%）</li>
<li>marcothrombocytopenia with mitral valve insufficiency（99.1%）</li>
<li>transient neonatal thrombocytopenia（99.1%）</li>
<li>dense granule disease（99.1%）</li>
<li>neurolymphomatosis（98.9%）</li>
<li>rhabdoid tumor（98.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/ruxolitinib-phosphate/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
